name: the-wisdom-of-crowds
description: Joe Abercrombie's dark fantasy novel — a mirror for understanding revolutionary dynamics, crowd psychology, institutional collapse, and the gap between ideals and reality when the mob takes power.
useCase: Revolutionary risk assessment, managing coalition decay, surviving institutional collapse, understanding mob psychology, recognizing personal motives in political movements.
knownRisks: This is a work of dark fantasy fiction, not a political science text
Characters and events are metaphorical, not prescriptive
Some may find the cynical view of revolution discouraging rather than instructive
